headline: Is It Time To Reassess T. Rowe Price Group (TROW) After Last Year’s 19.6% Return?
summary: With T. Rowe Price Group trading at US$104.53, you might be wondering whether the current share price reflects fair value or if there is a margin of safety still on the table. Over the short term, the stock has returned 1.1% over both the past 7 days and 30 days, is roughly flat year to date with a slight decline of 0.1%, and has returned 19.6% over the past year, while the 5 year return shows a decline of 32.8%. Recent headlines have focused on T. Rowe Price Group as an established asset...

summary: We just covered the Jeff Bezos Stock Portfolio: Top 10 Stock Picks and Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY) ranks 4th on this list.
